text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is helping me organize some
documents, when...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Look! City's in this magazine!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
She's so pretty. ♪ That outfit shows so much skin,
and she's rocking it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait, I just got the best idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we finish organizing, we head out for a
walk.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hey, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hello!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yuki! City! Perfect timing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You're a model, aren't you, City?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You must know a lot of grown-up models since
you're a cool grown-up yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So please tell me the secret to becoming a mature
woman! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A "mature woman," huh? You're obsessed with
that idea, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: A "mature woman"?! G-golly gee!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
...But come t'think of it... I'd like to hear the
secret to becom'n a city girl too!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Whaaat... You too, Yukino?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I'll tell you what I know, but how you take it
is up to you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to being a model, there are two
things you have to keep in mind.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: First is your condition.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you must always be the best
version of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The best version of myself... Cool! And the next
one?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Second is speed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You must have an antenna trained on new trends
so you can always be at the forefront.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: R-roger dodger!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That explains why you're always so twinkly, City!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So if I can do the same, I can grow up at Mach 10!
choice_data_list: I agree. Good condition is very important.
I agree. Good condition is very important.
I agree. Speed is very important.
I agree. Speed is very important.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So if I can do the same, I can grow up at Mach 10!
choice_data_list: I agree. Good condition is very important.
I agree. Good condition is very important.
I agree. Speed is very important.
I agree. Speed is very important.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Exactly! ♪ Good condition!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Good condition means... I've got to get stronger,
right? Okay, I think I know what to do!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I just need to up my stamina! Right, Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, let's go! Blink, and you might miss me
growing up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That's not what I meant, but... I guess it's fine.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: She'll grow up in a way only she can, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You're so cool! Makes me wanna be just like you
too, City!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to be the best version of herself, Mayano
Top Gun doubles down on her training and
manages to increase her stamina.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Exactly! ♪ My speed!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And when it comes to speed... I've got just the
thing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
A pacer test! I'm pretty sure one of my teachers
mentioned it before.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Then it's decided! ♪ Especially since it's got your
seal of approval, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Preparing for takeoff! ☆ I'll be the fastest ever! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: City... Um, I'm also itchin' t'be a city girl!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I see. In that case, don't concern yourself with
me... Just do your best.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Gotcha! Watch me jam!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun begins her pacer test training to
increase her speed. It ends up being quite
effective.
